plan_adjustments.risk: Plugin server() is called BEFORE capability registration — Proxy sees empty cache
plan_adjustments.current_flow: applyPlugin(load, input, hooks) → server(input) called inside → pluginId returned → capabilityRegistry.register(pluginId) at line 320
plan_adjustments.fix: Reorder in index.ts: register capability BEFORE calling server(). Must read manifest from plugin module before invoking server(), then register, then create scoped input, then call server(scopedInput).
plan_adjustments.plan_revision: fix-D must explicitly reorder: readV1Plugin → extract manifest → capabilityRegistry.register → makePluginInputProxy → plugin.server(scopedInput). This requires reading the plugin module's manifest export before calling server().

plan_adjustments.risk: Plugin can access `input.client.client` to get raw HTTP Client and bypass all checks
plan_adjustments.fix: Proxy get trap must explicitly block the `client` property key. Add to denylist: ['client', '_client', 'constructor', '__proto__'].
plan_adjustments.plan_revision: fix-C proxy.ts must include a PROPERTY_DENYLIST that blocks access to internal client refs.

plan_adjustments.risk: $.env().cwd() returns unproxied intermediate BunShell — chaining bypasses Proxy
plan_adjustments.fix: $.env(), $.cwd(), $.nothrow(), $.throws() must all return recursively proxied BunShell instances.
plan_adjustments.plan_revision: fix-C: makeScopedShell must create a recursive Proxy where method calls return new Proxied shells.

plan_adjustments.risk: Synchronous capability cache placement could create module cycle: proxy.ts ↔ plugin/index.ts
plan_adjustments.fix: Place the sync cache in a dedicated leaf module: `capability/cache.ts`. Export createCapabilityCache() factory. Both proxy.ts and plugin/index.ts import from it.
plan_adjustments.plan_revision: fixes B-C: create capability/cache.ts as a dedicated module. No module-level singleton — use factory per PluginService instance.

risks_already_covered: R7.1 (FALLBACK_MANIFEST too narrow) → plan expands to 11 capabilities
R7.2 + R7.3 (fetch/$ as siblings) → plan uses makePluginInputProxy wrapping entire PluginInput
R7.4 (namespace→capability map needed) → fix-B creates SDK_CAPABILITY_MAP
non_critical_risks_accepted: R3.1 (Proxy type erasure) → accept; use `as` cast at export boundary per zoning-board advice
R9.3 (sync/async impedance) → accept; fundamental constraint of Proxy pattern
R11.1 (nested object methods not proxied) → accept; namespace-level gating is sufficient
R11.3 (Proxy inspectable in dev tools) → accept; capability system is guardrail, not anti-malware
